deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.warningTitle: This will permanently delete your account
deleteAccount.warningBody: After a 30-day grace period, your personal data will be anonymized and your account will be permanently removed. Your order history will be retained for legal compliance but will no longer be linked to you.
deleteAccount.whatHappens: What happens when you delete your account:
deleteAccount.bullet1: Your profile, addresses, and saved payment methods are removed
deleteAccount.bullet2: Your reviews and store credit are permanently deleted
deleteAccount.bullet3: Active orders will still be fulfilled
deleteAccount.bullet4: You have 30 days to change your mind and cancel
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
deleteAccount.successBody: Your account will be permanently deleted on {{date}}. You can cancel this at any time by logging back in.
deleteAccount.pendingBody: Your account will be permanently deleted on {{date}}.
deleteAccount.cancelConfirmBody: Your account will be restored and the deletion will be cancelled.
deleteAccount.cancelError: Failed to cancel deletion. Please try again.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.contactUsDesc: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@wabbus.com.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body:
By accessing or using the Wabbus marketplace (the "Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree, you may not use the Platform.

Wabbus LLC ("Wabbus," "we," "us," or "our") reserves the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of updated Terms.

platform.title: 2. Platform Overview
platform.body: Wabbus is an online marketplace that connects customers with independent third-party sellers ("Vendors"). Wabbus provides the technology infrastructure and does not manufacture, warehouse, or directly sell any products listed by Vendors unless explicitly stated.

accounts.title: 3. Accounts
accounts.body:
You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your login credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or engage in fraudulent activity.

ordersPayments.title: 4. Orders & Payments
ordersPayments.bullet1: Prices are displayed in US dollars unless otherwise noted and are subject to change without notice.
ordersPayments.bullet2: Payment processing is handled by Stripe. Wabbus does not store full credit card details.
ordersPayments.bullet3: You agree to pay all applicable taxes and fees associated with your purchases.

returnsRefunds.title: 5. Returns & Refunds
returnsRefunds.body:
Return and refund eligibility is determined on a case-by-case basis and may depend on Vendor policies and the condition of the items received. Requests must be submitted through the Platform within the applicable return window.

Wabbus may facilitate refunds where appropriate but is not obligated to issue refunds for disputes between Customers and Vendors.

prohibitedConduct.title: 6. Prohibited Conduct
prohibitedConduct.bullet1: Use the Platform for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable law.
prohibitedConduct.bullet2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Platform.
prohibitedConduct.bullet3: Interfere with or disrupt the Platform’s infrastructure or services.
prohibitedConduct.bullet4: Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent information.
prohibitedConduct.bullet5: Engage in harassment, abuse, or threatening behavior toward other users.

intellectualProperty.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: All content, branding, and software on the Platform are owned by or licensed to Wabbus LLC. You may not reproduce, modify, or distribute any Platform content without our written permission. Vendor-submitted product listings remain the property of their respective owners.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.body:
To the fullest extent permitted by law, Wabbus LLC shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Platform.

The Platform is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied.

governingLaw.title: 9. Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of New York, without regard to conflict of law principles.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.contactUsDesc: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@wabbus.com.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.body:
This Privacy Policy describes how Wabbus LLC collects, uses, discloses, and safeguards personal information when you access or use our marketplace services. This policy applies to users located within the United States.

By using the Services, you acknowledge that you have read and understand this Privacy Policy.

marketplace.title: 2. Marketplace Structure
marketplace.body: Wabbus operates a marketplace that connects customers with independent third-party sellers ("Vendors").
marketplace.bullet1: Wabbus provides and maintains the Platform infrastructure.
marketplace.bullet2: Vendors are independent businesses responsible for fulfilling orders.
marketplace.bullet3: Wabbus is not the manufacturer or direct seller of vendor-listed products unless explicitly stated.
marketplace.orderHeading: When a Customer places an order:
marketplace.orderBullet1: Order details (such as name and shipping address) are shared with the specific Vendor fulfilling that order.
marketplace.orderBullet2: Vendors receive only the information necessary to process and ship the order.
marketplace.orderBullet3: Vendors are not permitted to use Customer information for marketing purposes.
marketplace.orderBullet4: Vendors cannot initiate unsolicited communications with Customers.
marketplace.orderBullet5: Messaging is only available when a Customer initiates communication after completing a purchase.

collection.title: 3. Information We Collect
collection.body: We collect only information necessary to operate, secure, and maintain the marketplace. We do not sell personal information.
collection.customerBullet6: IP address (for security and fraud prevention)
collection.noCardNotice: We do not store full credit card numbers.
collection.noCardNoticeDesc: Payment processing and card verification are handled by Stripe.
collection.noAnalyticsNotice: We do not use analytics platforms. We do not run advertising networks. We do not use behavioral advertising tools.

usage.title: 4. How We Use Information
usage.body: We use personal information solely to operate and protect the marketplace, including to:
usage.item5: Prevent fraud, abuse, and unauthorized activity
usage.item8: Comply with legal and tax obligations
usage.noAdvertisingNotice: We do not use personal information for advertising purposes. We do not sell personal information.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question about your order, account, or the marketplace? We're here to help.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.intro: Wabbus is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people of all abilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.
accessibility.complianceBody: We aim to conform to Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1, Level AA compliance. These guidelines help make content accessible to a wider range of people with disabilities.
accessibility.standardsBody: We take the following steps to ensure accessibility:
accessibility.standard1Desc: Using standard-compliant markup to ensure screen readers navigate content logically.
accessibility.standard2Desc: Every functional element is fully accessible via keyboard, including visible focus states.
accessibility.standard3Desc: Interfaces are designed with high color contrast for users with low vision or color blindness.
accessibility.standard4Desc: The platform scales elegantly from desktops to screen magnifiers and mobile devices.
accessibility.inclusiveBody: We believe everyone should enjoy equal access to our marketplace. Our commitment to accessibility means we design with all users in mind, from product discovery to checkout.
accessibility.adaBody: Wabbus strives to comply with the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA), ensuring that our services are accessible to individuals with disabilities.
accessibility.feedbackBody: If you encounter any accessibility barriers on our platform, please let us know so we can address them.

global.title: Something went wrong
global.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or return to the home page.

updates.title: Update Available
updates.message: A new version has been downloaded and is ready to install.
